tasks.subject: Task 1: PushedSet class + 5 unit tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Ship the PushedSet Redis-backed claim-set primitive with full unit test coverage.

**Files:**
- Create: `apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/class/PushedSet.ts`
- Create: `apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/class/PushedSet.test.ts` (TDD-gate stub)
- Create: `apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/tests/PushedSet.shared.test.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- PushedSet exports class with `tryClaim`, `release`, `cleanup` methods.
- Constructor: `(redisClient, crawlId, opts?: { ttlSeconds?: number; monitor?: RedisHealthMonitor })`.
- Key format `pushed:${crawlId}`.
- `tryClaim` returns true on first SADD, false on second for same URL.
- `tryClaim` returns true on Redis error (fail-open, mirrors DedupManager.addUrl:98).
- `ensureTtl` fires expire at most once per `ttlSeconds/2` window.
- Monitor injection: `onSuccess('pushed')` / `onError('pushed', e)` channels.
- `cleanup` deletes Redis key and logs `Cleaned up pushed set for pushed:${crawlId}`.
- 5 unit tests pass; 89 total green (84 baseline + 5 new).

**Verify:** `cd apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler && npm test 2>&1 | tail -5` → `pass 89`

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/class/PushedSet.ts","apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/class/PushedSet.test.ts","apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/tests/PushedSet.shared.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler && npm test 2>&1 | tail -5","acceptanceCriteria":["PushedSet class with tryClaim/release/cleanup","Key format pushed:{crawlId}","tryClaim first-call true, second-call false","Fail-open on Redis error","ensureTtl rate-limited per ttlSeconds/2 window","Monitor onSuccess/onError on pushed channel","cleanup deletes key + logs Cleaned up pushed set","5 new unit tests pass","89 total green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Wire PushedSet in context.ts + main.ts (init + cleanup)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Make `context.pushedSet` available everywhere `context.dedupManager` is. Wire teardown in both existing cleanup sites.

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/context.ts` (add `pushedSet` field + import)
- Modify: `apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/main.ts:526` (construction alongside DedupManager)
- Modify: `apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/main.ts:540-545` (mid-crawl cleanup)
- Modify: `apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/main.ts:1078-1081` (shutdown cleanup)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- `context.ts` adds `pushedSet: undefined as PushedSet | undefined`.
- `main.ts:526+` constructs PushedSet with shared Redis client + redisMonitor.
- Both teardown blocks call `await context.pushedSet?.cleanup()` next to `dedupManager.cleanup()`.
- Cleanup order matches construction order: dedup → pushed → stats.
- `npm run build` clean.
- All 89 tests still green (Task 1 baseline; pure wiring, no new tests).

**Verify:** `cd apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler && npm run build && npm test 2>&1 | tail -5` → `pass 89`

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/context.ts","apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/main.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler && npm run build && npm test 2>&1 | tail -5","acceptanceCriteria":["context.pushedSet field added","main.ts constructs PushedSet with sharedRedis + monitor","Mid-crawl cleanup wired at main.ts:540-545","Shutdown cleanup wired at main.ts:1078-1081","Cleanup order dedup-pushed-stats","npm run build clean","89 tests still green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Guard 3 pushData callsites + Option A retry-bypass + 5 integration tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wire `tryClaim` guard at all 3 dataset-write callsites; relax doublon early-bail so retries replay the handler; add 5 integration tests proving the bug case is fixed.

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/functions.ts:1625-1644` (routerDefaultHandler main dataset)
- Modify: `apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/routes.ts:387` (Option A retry-bypass)
- Modify: `apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/routes.ts:446` (errorDataset push)
- Modify: `apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/routes.ts:917` (nfrDataset push)
- Create: `apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/tests/routes.pushedSet.test.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- `routerDefaultHandler` guards pushData via `pushedSet.tryClaim(url)`; `markRequestHandled` STILL FIRES on skip (critical — otherwise Crawlee retries forever).
- `routes.ts:387` becomes `if (!isDoublon || request.retryCount > 0)`.
- `routes.ts:446` (errorDataset) wraps pushData with `if (!context.pushedSet || (await context.pushedSet.tryClaim(request.url)))`.
- `routes.ts:917` (nfrDataset) wraps pushData with same pattern.
- Grep confirms: `tryClaim` 1 hit in functions.ts, 2 hits in routes.ts; `request.retryCount > 0` 1 hit in routes.ts.
- 5 integration tests pass: happy path, retry-after-pushData, retry-before-pushData, Option A retry-bypass logic, three-callsite smoke.
- 94 total green (89 baseline + 5 new).

**Verify:** `cd apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler && npm test 2>&1 | tail -5` → `pass 94`

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/functions.ts","apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/routes.ts","apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/tests/routes.pushedSet.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler && npm test 2>&1 | tail -5","acceptanceCriteria":["routerDefaultHandler guards pushData via tryClaim","markRequestHandled fires on skip path","routes.ts:387 condition: !isDoublon || retryCount > 0","routes.ts:446 errorDataset guarded","routes.ts:917 nfrDataset guarded","Grep confirms 1+2+1 hits","5 new integration tests pass","94 total green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Guard UpdateChecker.checkUrl + 1 integration test
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Extend PushedSet guard to update-mode JSONL writer path; retried handlers in update mode avoid duplicate emissions.

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/class/UpdateChecker.ts` (constructor 4th arg + checkUrl entry guard)
- Modify: `apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/main.ts:747` (pass `context.pushedSet` as 4th arg)
- Create: `apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/tests/UpdateChecker.pushedSet.test.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- `UpdateChecker` constructor accepts optional `pushedSet: PushedSet | null = null` as 4th arg.
- `checkUrl(originalUrl, ...)` first step: `if (this.pushedSet && !(await this.pushedSet.tryClaim(originalUrl))) return { action: 'ignored', url: originalUrl, source, reason: 'already_pushed' };`.
- `main.ts:747` passes `context.pushedSet ?? null` as 4th arg.
- 1 integration test verifies: first checkUrl call emits new_url to NEW_URLS_FILE, second call for same URL returns ignored/already_pushed with zero writeJsonl invocations.
- 95 total green (94 baseline + 1 new).

**Verify:** `cd apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler && npm test 2>&1 | tail -5` → `pass 95`

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/class/UpdateChecker.ts","apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/main.ts","apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/tests/UpdateChecker.pushedSet.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler && npm test 2>&1 | tail -5","acceptanceCriteria":["UpdateChecker constructor accepts pushedSet 4th arg","checkUrl guards via tryClaim as first step","Returns ignored/already_pushed on skip with zero side effects","main.ts:747 passes context.pushedSet","1 new integration test passes","95 total green"]}
```
